gt_sql: SELECT T2.power_name FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.power_name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.hero_id) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT sp.power_name
FROM hero_power hp
JOIN superpower sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
GROUP BY sp.power_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1
question: Which power do superheroes have the most of?
